about.title: About Me
about.bio:
I am an experienced Full-Stack Web Developer with a passion for software design and DevOps. I specialize in building robust solutions from the ground up and leading development teams to solve complex technical challenges.

Whether it’s architecting new systems or optimizing existing ones, I combine technical know-how with strategic thinking to deliver software that exceeds expectations.

professional_project.title: Professional Project
professional_project.specialty: Web application security and DevSecOps integration.

experience.description:
• Systems Engineering: Implemented High Availability (HA) Nginx reverse proxy architecture using Keepalived and VRRP
• Security/Identity: Directed the global migration of infrastructure services (Jenkins, Artifactory, SonarQube) to secure LDAPS/Active Directory via SSSD
• IT Operations: Supervised major Linux OS upgrades (Ubuntu, Debian, Rocky Linux), storage expansion (LVM), and monitoring capabilities (Zabbix)
• CI/CD: Maintained and administered complex continuous integration and delivery pipelines
• Software Engineering: Developed internal automation tooling

• Reduced critical daily application exceptions from 4,000 to 0
• Improved application rating report generation speed by over 110x
• Upgraded legacy code base from Laravel 5.7 to 10
• Managed infrastructure migration from Digital Ocean to Azure
• Educated junior developers on best practices and conducted technical interviews

experience.role: Full Stack Web Developer & Linux SysAdmin
experience.description:
• Developed websites with Python (Django) and PHP (Laravel, Symfony, CakePHP)
• Built front-ends using Vue, Angular, Tailwind, Element Plus
• Set up CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, BitBucket Pipelines, Jenkins)
• Managed Linux servers, Docker containers, and databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL)
• Practiced Test Driven Development with PHPUnit and Selenium

• Developed new features (PHP with Yii2 Framework, MySQL, Redis) for a fractional real estate platform
• Optimized static assets and improved browser compatibility
• Set up continuous deployment workflow and configured servers to improve security

• Executed lead generation and Info Scraping using custom Python scripts (BeautifulSoup, XPath, OAuth)
• Managed PrestaShop platform, implemented Google Analytics, Tag Manager, and Mixpanel
• Improved accessibility and SEO strategies

• Co-founded an eco-friendly mobile car cleaning service
• Architected and developed the MVP web platform using CakePHP and Bootstrap
• Designed MariaDB database and integrated PayPal API processing
• Implemented Test Driven Development (TDD) via PHPUnit and Selenium

education.degree: BTS SIO specialized in Software Solutions (SLAM)

education.description: Software engineering, C application development, web development, Linux system administration.
Bachelor coursework: programming, web marketing tools, digital communication strategy, project management, business development, entrepreneurship.

education.degree: BSc Coursework in Business Intelligence & Econometrics
education.description: First-year coursework (Licence Informatique Décisionnelle et Econométrie Appliquée).

interests: Tech & Science Literature (Hacker News, daily.dev, Phys.org)

recommendations.text: [William] consistently delivered high-quality code and demonstrated a deep understanding of both front-end and back-end technologies. His problem-solving skills and dedication to meeting deadlines make him an asset to any development team.
recommendations.author: Ronak Koya

recommendations.text: Apart from his technical expertise, [William] is helpful to juniors and mentors them freely. An honest person, open for feedback and criticism. Overall a very solid team player and team leader.
recommendations.author: Cedrick Rey Lariosa

recommendations.text: I often relied on his expertise to navigate and resolve complex technical challenges... What sets William apart is not just his technical proficiency but also his approachability... ensuring that our clients received prompt and effective solutions.
recommendations.author: Almon Joyce Herodias

recommendations.text: His exceptional skills and dedication were evident in his role on our project, contributing significantly to its success. A true asset to any team.
recommendations.author: Jitendra Oza
